sections.title: (1) This Act may be cited as the Value Added Tax Short title
sections.body:
and
(Amendment) Act, 2011, and shall be read as one with the Value commencement
Added Tax Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. Cap. 331
(2) This Act shall come into operation on 1st January, 2012.

sections.title: Section two of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.body:
of the definition of “ accounting year” and the substitution therefor of section 2
of the following:
“ accounting year” means a period of twelve months ending on
31st December or such other period as the Commissioner-
General may prescribe.”
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 1,000 each.
